title: Smooth Pack
description: A Performance Modpack for the most FPS with some Quality of Life mods
body:
## A lot of work and fine-tuning has gone into this modpack. If you notice anything that doesn’t work properly or something you don’t like, please let me know so it can be improved.

## If everything runs well for you, feel free to share it with your friends and help the modpack reach a wider audience.

**For recommendations on graphics settings, see Help at the bottom of the page.**
- [Discord](https://discord.gg/wNM2wWkc)
- [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/smooth-pack)

![Starter Image(WOW)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9256587c19d97ebc9538bd852b6e0e6127975649_0.webp)

## If you're running a version earlier than 3.0.0, delete the modpack and reinstall it (remember to back up your worlds in the “saves” folder)

 **What are the plans for this modpack?**
~~On Modrnith, there will only be a PvP version and one for Neofoge, but not Extra or New.
This modpack will now focus only on performance.~~ There used to be an expansion on Curseforge, but it is no longer being updated. However, the modpack itself will still be expanded to support other versions.
[Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/smooth-pack)

 **Why should I use the modpack at all?**

You get significantly higher FPS than in Vanilla (my FPS in pictures) with a few quality-of-life mods and total smoothness


**Credits:**

Credits go to all **mod developers** who made this modpack possible. Thank you for your work!

 **Compatibility:**

This modpack works on servers. Nevertheless, you should always check whether the servers prohibit things like zoom or similar, but these mods are not really that critical.

**Help, I have a bug or an idea!**

If you encounter any issues with this modpack, feel free to join the _[Discord](https://discord.com/invite/wNM2wWkc)_ and report bugs in the Bugs channel. Ideas and suggestions are also welcome in the Ideas channel.

How much RAM should I allocate to this modpack?

- Minimum RAM: 1.5 GB
- Good RAM: 1.5-4 GB
- Maximum RAM: 4-8(10) GB

 **Important:**

When you go to Mods, you will now see a mod called Bobby. This mod allows you to set your render distance above 32 in the graphics settings. It lets you see further on servers, but in **single player**, never set the **_render distance_** above **_32_** , otherwise it will lag extremely!!

 different performance settings


<details>
<summary>These settings are recommended</summary>

Potato Settings:
1. Render Distance=8
2. Simulation Distance=5
3. Clouds=Fast
4. Cloud Distance=24
5. See throgh leaves=OFF
6. Weather Effect=3
7. Particles=Minimal
8. Biome Blend=NONE
9. Entity Distance=50-75%
10. Entity Shadows=Off
11. Mipmap Levels=0x

Very Low Settings:
1. Render Distance=10
2. Simulation Distance=7
3. Clouds=Fast
4. Cloud Distance=32
5. See throgh leaves=OFF
6. Weather Effect=5
7. Particles=Minimal
8. Biome Blend=3x3
9. Entity Distance=50-75%
10. Entity Shadows=Off
11. Mipmap Levels=0x

Low Settings(Default Setting):
1. Render Distance=14
2. Simulation Distance=8
3. Clouds=Fast
4. Cloud Distance=48
5. See throgh leaves=OFF
6. Weather Effect=5
7. Particles=Decreased
8. Biome Blend=5x5
9. Entity Distance=75%
10. Entity Shadows=Off
11. Mipmap Levels=1x

Medium Settings:
1. Render Distance=18
2. Simulation Distance=10
3. Clouds=Fast
4. Cloud Distance=64
5. See throgh leaves=ON
6. Weather Effect=7
7. Particles=Decreased
8. Biome Blend=9x9
9. Entity Distance=100%
10. Entity Shadows=ON
11. Mipmap Levels=2x

High Settings:
1. Render Distance=24
2. Simulation Distance=16
3. Clouds=Fancy
4. Cloud Distance=80
5. See throgh leaves=ON
6. Weather Effect=10
7. Particles=Decreased
8. Biome Blend=11x11
9. Entity Distance=100%
10. Entity Shadows=ON
11. Mipmap Levels=3x

Ultra Settings:
1. Render Distance=32
2. Simulation Distance=20
3. Clouds=Fancy
4. Cloud Distance=96
5. See throgh leaves=ON
6. Weather Effect=10
7. Particles=All
8. Biome Blend=13x13
9. Entity Distance=125-150%
10. Entity Shadows=ON
11. Mipmap Levels=4x

God Settings:
1. Render Distance=32
2. Simulation Distance=26
3. Clouds=Fancy
4. Cloud Distance=128
5. See throgh leaves=ON
6. Weather Effect=10
7. Particles=All
8. Biome Blend=15x15
9. Entity Distance=150-200%
10. Entity Shadows=ON
11. Mipmap Levels=4x


</details>
